items.description: Advanced Codex users. We shipped a replacement to coarse sandbox modes: reusable, inheritable permission profiles binding OS-enforced file read/write/deny rules (even **/*.env) to per-domain network + Unix sockets. Plus fail-closed admin a…

items.title: For writing and editing, plain vanilla Claude web is still the best (vs Codex and Claude…
items.title_zh: 对于写作和编辑来说，普通的 Claude Web 仍然是最好的（与 Codex 和 Claude 相比......
items.description: For writing and editing, plain vanilla Claude web is still the best (vs Codex and Claude Code). My guess is something in the coding agent's system prompts make them crappier writers.
items.description_zh: 对于写作和编辑来说，普通的 Claude Web 仍然是最好的（相对于 Codex 和 Claude Code）。我的猜测是编码代理的系统提示中的某些内容使他们成为更糟糕的作家。

items.description: my process for writing right now is to do some engineering work, talk to a bunch of people about it, brainstorm and research with Claude, write a post, give 1 or 2 talks on it, rewrite the post, give another talk, rewrite the intro, wake u…
items.description_zh: 我现在的写作过程是做一些工程工作，和一群人讨论这个问题，与克劳德一起集思广益和研究，写一篇文章，就它进行一到两次演讲，重写这篇文章，再做一次演讲，重写介绍，叫醒你……
